---
title: "Meeting Notes"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
format:
  docx:
    toc: false
---

# Meeting Details

- **Date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
- **Time:** [HH:MM - HH:MM]
- **Location:** [In-person / Virtual platform]
- **Note taker:** [Name]

## Attendees

- [ ] [Name 1]
- [ ] [Name 2]
- [ ] [Name 3]

## Agenda

1. [Agenda item 1]
2. [Agenda item 2]
3. [Agenda item 3]

# Discussion Notes

## [Topic 1]

[Notes]

## [Topic 2]

[Notes]

# Decisions Made

| Decision | Rationale | Made by |
|----------|-----------|---------|
| | | |

# Action Items

| # | Action | Assignee | Due Date | Status |
|---|--------|----------|----------|--------|
| 1 | | | | Open |
| 2 | | | | Open |
| 3 | | | | Open |

# Next Meeting

- **Date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
- **Agenda items to carry forward:**

---

*Meeting notes recorded with AI assistance. Content verified by attendees.*
